title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
innovation_summary: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework: To unlock this and demonstrate its effectiveness, we introduce LLM-as-a-Verifier, a general-purpose verification framework that provides fine-grained feedback for agentic tasks without requiring additional training.
